title: Feature: Reviewer RL Integration and Structured-Output Reliability

done: extract_model_from_action fix (model_selection.rs) — preserves native provider/model format, merged in same session
swarm_phase.rs task_assign — workplan tasks now show agent in hex task list, merged in same session

steps.description: Add JSON retry loop inside ReviewerAgent::execute_with_preference (reviewer.rs). Detect parse failure via is_parse_failure() fingerprint on the parse_review fallback. Attempt 0: normal call. Attempt 1: same model + JSON enforcement suffix. Attempt 2: HEX_REVIEWER_UPGRADE_MODEL (default claude-haiku-4-5-20251001) + JSON suffix. If all 3 fail, return ReviewResult { verdict: 'PASS', reviewer_skipped: true }. Supervisor logs warn and writes reviewer_skipped flag to review-latest.json.
steps.done_condition: cargo check passes; unit test: given non-JSON reviewer response, synthetic verdict file is written and contains reviewer_skipped:true

steps.description: Fix RL model selection for reviewer by passing YAML model as soft preference (model_preference) not hard override to execute_with_preference. Supervisor calls agent.execute_with_preference(context, model_override=CLI-only, model_preference=yaml_model_id, provider_pref). Inside agent, select_model(TaskType::Reasoning, effective_override=model_override.or(model_preference)) — RL can override when Q-table has data, YAML preference acts as default when Q-table is empty.
steps.done_condition: cargo check passes; supervisor no longer passes reviewer_model_id as hard model_override

steps.description: Report reviewer outcome to RL engine via existing report_outcome call in reviewer.rs. Negative reward fires per failed attempt (is_parse_failure) and on complete exhaustion. Positive reward fires on successful JSON parse. Reward fires unconditionally (not source-gated) to accumulate Q-table signal from the first run.
steps.done_condition: cargo check passes; report_outcome called after every reviewer attempt

steps.description: Integration smoke test: run hex dev against examples/hello-world and verify (a) ReviewPasses clears on all tiers, (b) hex task list shows agent assignment, (c) no 'max_iterations reached' in output for reviewer-blocked tiers. If free model is unavailable, the synthetic fallback verdict should allow the pipeline to complete.
steps.done_condition: hex dev completes all tiers without hitting max_iterations due to ReviewPasses; pipeline report shows all objectives met

mergeOrder: step-1, step-2, step-3 sequential (all tier-0) → step-4 last

riskRegister.risk: extract_model_from_action bug — RL model ID mangled before reaching inference
riskRegister.mitigation: RESOLVED: fix shipped in same session (model_selection.rs preserves native provider/model format)

riskRegister.risk: Synthetic PASS verdict hides real code quality issues
riskRegister.mitigation: reviewer_skipped:true flag + tracing warn make the skip visible; RL negative reward ensures system routes away from flaky models over time

riskRegister.risk: Retry increases reviewer latency by up to 3x on bad models
riskRegister.mitigation: Free models already have high latency; upgrade on retry-2 typically reduces total wall time vs. waiting for a third slow free response

successCriteria: hex dev pipeline completes all tiers without hitting ReviewPasses max_iterations on a fresh hex project
After 3+ pipeline runs, RL Q-table shows structured_review entries with positive Q-values for reliable models
hex task list shows agent assignments for all workplan tasks (separate fix already merged)
